title: 宝塚記念の後に・焦り禁物わかってらあ

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yes... Yes, yes, yes!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I did it! I nailed it! I did just as well here as I did at
the spring Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I bet everyone's—

text_block_list.name: Townsman
text_block_list.text:
Didja see that, central chumps? That there's our
very own Inari One!

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text: Inariii! The Pride of Oi!

text_block_list.name: Female Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Inari One was amazing! If she was able to run like
that after her performance at the spring Tenno
Sho, she might actually be the real deal!

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, maybe she can even level with Oguri!
Imagine how awesome it'd be to see them face
off!

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Now it feels like an ever greater shame that she
didn't compete in any central races during her
classic year. She's such a great runner—I would've
loved to see her race!

text_block_list.name: Female Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Same! Can you imagine if she'd been at the Arima
Kinen with Tamamo Cross? That would've been
incredible.

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
Inari One has really done it. After seeing her run
at the spring Tenno Sho and today, there's no
room for doubt anymore. She's truly got what it
takes!

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
Now I've just gotta get her the attention she
deserves! I should write an article about her... I'll
title it, "The Racer Carrying the Hopes and
Dreams of the Regionals"!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: No, hang on. It's still too early to get so excited.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I haven't raced against Oguri 'n' Creek yet. The
real fight doesn't start until then!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Keep your head in the game, Inari One! You're
not even close to becomin' Umamusume of the
Year yet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One may have won the Takarazuka Kinen,
but she remains quite tense long after the race
ends.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: This isn't enough.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I needa win more races! I needa win an even
bigger race!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Tell me, Boss! What should I run in next?
choice_data_list:
Before we decide that, can we talk for a
second?

Before we decide that, can we talk for a
second?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Tell me, Boss! What should I run in next?
choice_data_list:
Before we decide that, can we talk for a
second?

Before we decide that, can we talk for a
second?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's the deal?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've noticed something off about her behavior
lately.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She used to beam with happiness before and after
races, like she was celebrating at a festival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But now...
choice_data_list: I think you've gotten too tense.
I think you've gotten too tense.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: No way, I—

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Er, sorry. Maybe you're right.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Er, sorry. Maybe you're right.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Everyone who ran today was super strong. And
it's not just them I gotta worry about. There's still
Oguri 'n' the others from this generation I needa
contend with.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But unless I can prove my worth to everyone,
there's no way I can reach the top 'n' become
Umamusume of the Year.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
When I think about that, I just can't be satisfied
with my run today.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine now, though, thanks to you. Your words
cooled my head right back down.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine now, though, thanks to you. Your words
cooled my head right back down.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
There's no point freakin' out. I just gotta use
today's race as a steppin' stone to the next race
'n' keep movin' forward!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One looks a little more like her usual self as
she smiles after her declaration.
choice_data_list:
Okay. Let's start preparing for the autumn
Tenno Sho then.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sounds good! I'm gonna leave my mark there the
same way I did in spring 'n' shock the world with
what I've got!
choice_data_list: This might be your toughest battle yet.
This might be your toughest battle yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's all but certain that Oguri Cap and Super
Creek will be coming back from their time off for
the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I know. But I gotta beat Oguri 'n' Creek at some
point or another if I'm gonna prove that I'm the
best, and this is the perfect chance to try.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
By the way, we gonna be chargin' straight ahead
into the autumn Tenno Sho or are we makin' a pit
stop somewhere else first?
choice_data_list: I'd like you to run in the Mainichi Okan too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we use the Mainichi Okan as a lead-in to the
autumn Tenno Sho, we'll have a chance to do
last-minute adjustments as needed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Plus, if Oguri Cap and the others also run in the
Mainichi Okan, we'll be able to get a sense for
how they'll perform at the big race, too.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All right! Oguri and Creek better watch out,
'cause I'm gonna beat the stuffin' outta them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The tension in the air earlier has vanished, and I
feel like I can breathe easier. But...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Has Inari One really returned to her normal self?
Unfortunately, I have no way to know for sure.
